# Generated by tools/generate_stellar_ai_director_patch.py.
# Full-object override ownership: copied from the pinned Spacefleet Tactica equivalence source.


SFTt_ship_uses_regular_role = {

	is_arkship_ship = no

	NOT = { is_ship_size = colossus }

	NOT = { is_ship_size = military_station_small }
	NOT = { is_ship_size = military_station_medium }
	NOT = { is_ship_size = military_station_large }
	NOT = { is_ship_size = ion_cannon }

	NOT = { is_ship_size = starbase_outpost }
	NOT = { is_ship_size = starbase_starport }
	NOT = { is_ship_size = starbase_starhold }
	NOT = { is_ship_size = starbase_starfortress }
	NOT = { is_ship_size = starbase_citadel }
	NOT = { is_ship_size = orbital_ring_tier_1 }
	NOT = { is_ship_size = orbital_ring_tier_2 }
	NOT = { is_ship_size = orbital_ring_tier_3 }

	NOT = { is_ship_size = starbase_deep_space_citadel_1 }
	NOT = { is_ship_size = starbase_deep_space_citadel_2 }
	NOT = { is_ship_size = starbase_deep_space_citadel_3 }

	NOT = { is_ship_size = starbase_waystation_1 }
	NOT = { is_ship_size = starbase_waystation_2 }
	NOT = { is_ship_size = starbase_waystation_3 }

	NOT = { is_ship_size = explorationship }								##### NSC explorationship
	NOT = { is_ship_size = starbase_stronghold }							##### NSC 에서 추가된 항성기지
	NOT = { is_ship_size = starbase_headquarters }							##### NSC 에서 추가된 항성기지

}

SFTt_ship_uses_swarm_role = {

	SFTt_ship_uses_regular_role = yes

	OR = {
		ship_uses_swarm_role = yes
		AND = { is_extra_ship_components_activate = yes ESC_ship_uses_swarm_computers = yes }
		AND = { SFTt_ADDON_COMBAT_COM_REST_REMOVED = yes SFTt_ship_uses_regular_role = yes }
	}

}

SFTt_ship_uses_torpedo_role = {

	SFTt_ship_uses_regular_role = yes

	OR = {
		ship_uses_torpedo_role = yes
		AND = { is_extra_ship_components_activate = yes ESC_ship_uses_torpedo_computers = yes }
		AND = { SFTt_ADDON_COMBAT_COM_REST_REMOVED = yes SFTt_ship_uses_regular_role = yes }
		OR = {
			is_ship_size = crisis_cruiser
		}
	}

}

SFTt_ship_uses_picket_role = {

	SFTt_ship_uses_regular_role = yes

	OR = {
		ship_uses_picket_role = yes
		AND = { is_extra_ship_components_activate = yes ESC_ship_uses_picket_computers = yes }
		AND = { SFTt_ADDON_COMBAT_COM_REST_REMOVED = yes SFTt_ship_uses_regular_role = yes }
	}

}

SFTt_ship_uses_line_role = {

	SFTt_ship_uses_regular_role = yes

	OR = {
		ship_uses_line_role = yes
		AND = { is_extra_ship_components_activate = yes ESC_ship_uses_line_computers = yes }
		AND = { SFTt_ADDON_COMBAT_COM_REST_REMOVED = yes SFTt_ship_uses_regular_role = yes }
	}

}

SFTt_ship_uses_artillery_role = {

	SFTt_ship_uses_regular_role = yes

	OR = {
		ship_uses_artillery_role = yes
		AND = { is_extra_ship_components_activate = yes ESC_ship_uses_artillery_computers = yes }
		AND = { SFTt_ADDON_COMBAT_COM_REST_REMOVED = yes SFTt_ship_uses_regular_role = yes }
		OR = {
			is_ship_size = crisis_corvette
		}
	}

}

SFTt_ship_uses_carrier_role = {

	SFTt_ship_uses_regular_role = yes

	OR = {
		ship_uses_carrier_role = yes
		AND = { is_extra_ship_components_activate = yes ESC_ship_uses_carrier_computers = yes }
		AND = { SFTt_ADDON_COMBAT_COM_REST_REMOVED = yes SFTt_ship_uses_regular_role = yes }
		AND = { SFTt_ADDON_FF_SP_ACTIVATED = yes is_ship_size = frigate }
		OR = {
			SFTt_SHIP_SIZE_DD = yes
			is_ship_size = crisis_corvette
			is_ship_size = crisis_destroyer
			is_ship_size = crisis_cruiser
			is_ship_size = cosmo_crisis_destroyer
			SFTt_SHIP_SIZE_TI = yes
		}
	}

}

SFTt_ship_uses_debuffer_role = {

	SFTt_ship_uses_regular_role = yes

	OR = {
		ship_uses_debuffer_role = yes
		AND = { is_extra_ship_components_activate = yes ESC_ship_uses_debuffer_computers = yes }
		AND = { SFTt_ADDON_COMBAT_COM_REST_REMOVED = yes SFTt_ship_uses_regular_role = yes }
		AND = { SFTt_ADDON_FF_SP_ACTIVATED = yes is_ship_size = frigate }
	}

}

SFTt_ship_uses_buffer_role = {

	SFTt_ship_uses_regular_role = yes

	OR = {
		ship_uses_buffer_role = yes
		AND = { is_extra_ship_components_activate = yes ESC_ship_uses_buffer_computers = yes }
		AND = { SFTt_ADDON_COMBAT_COM_REST_REMOVED = yes SFTt_ship_uses_regular_role = yes }
		AND = { SFTt_ADDON_FF_SP_ACTIVATED = yes is_ship_size = frigate }
	}

}

SFTt_ship_uses_max_role = {

	SFTt_ship_uses_regular_role = yes

}
